creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
The dejasearch port will not run without p5-libwww installed.
However, dejasearch's Makefile does not list any dependencies.

The patch below fixes this, as well as making a minor change if
NOPORTDOCS is defined.

No files have been removed. pkg/PLIST.nodocs has been added.

How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/news/dejasearch
# make all
# grep LWP work/dejasearch/dejasearch
